title: Mobile app version is changed
scenario: Mobile app version is not correctly reflected on Lens tenant pages (Device user, Inventory, Mobile profile, Device profile) after app upgrade
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Navigate to Account → App Settings and note the current app version.
3. Upgrade the Poly Studio Mobile app to the latest version via the app store (Google Play Store or Apple App Store).
4. Open the upgraded Poly Studio Mobile app and verify the new version is displayed in Account → App Settings.
5. Log in to the Lens tenant (web portal) using admin credentials.
6. Navigate to the Device user / Mobile user page and confirm the new app version is reflected for the associated user.
7. Navigate to the Inventory page and verify the new app version is shown for the device.
8. Navigate to the Mobile profile page and confirm the app version matches the updated version.
9. Navigate to the Device profile page and verify the new app version is correctly displayed.
expected: The new app version is correctly reflected on the Lens tenant across the Device user/Mobile user page, Inventory page, Mobile profile page, and Device profile page.
